mapper.select: select c.*, u.name user_name, u.employee_no, p.destination from consultations c join users u on u.id = c.user_id join travel_plans p on p.id = c.plan_id where c.plan_id = #{planId} and c.participant_user_id = #{participantUserId} order by c.created_at, c.id

select c.participant_user_id, u.employee_no, u.name user_name, max(c.created_at) latest_created_at, coalesce(sum(case when c.sender_role = 1 and c.created_at > coalesce(r.last_read_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') then 1 else 0 end), 0) unread_count from consultations c join users u on u.id = c.participant_user_id left join consultation_reads r on r.plan_id = c.plan_id and r.participant_user_id = c.participant_user_id and r.reader_role = 0 and r.reader_user_id = 0 where c.plan_id = #{planId} group by c.participant_user_id, u.employee_no, u.name order by max(c.created_at) desc, c.participant_user_id

select c.participant_user_id, u.employee_no, u.name user_name, c.plan_id, p.plan_no, max(c.created_at) latest_created_at, coalesce(sum(case when #{admin} = true and c.sender_role = 1 and c.created_at > coalesce(r.last_read_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') then 1 when #{admin} = false and c.user_id != #{userId} and c.created_at > coalesce(r.last_read_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') then 1 else 0 end), 0) unread_count from consultations c join users u on u.id = c.participant_user_id join travel_plans p on p.id = c.plan_id left join consultation_reads r on r.plan_id = c.plan_id and r.participant_user_id = c.participant_user_id and r.reader_role = case when #{admin} = true then 0 else 1 end and r.reader_user_id = case when #{admin} = true then 0 else #{userId} end where 1 = 1
and c.participant_user_id = #{userId} and p.published = true
group by c.participant_user_id, u.employee_no, u.name, c.plan_id, p.plan_no order by max(c.created_at) desc, c.participant_user_id, c.plan_id
mapper.insert: insert into consultations(plan_id, user_id, participant_user_id, sender_role, content, status) values(#{planId}, #{userId}, #{participantUserId}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, #{status})

insert into consultation_reads(plan_id, participant_user_id, reader_role, reader_user_id, last_read_at) values(#{planId}, #{participantUserId}, #{readerRole}, #{readerUserId}, current_timestamp) on duplicate key update last_read_at = values(last_read_at)
